channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New School economist: Trump Accounts will widen America's wealth gaps
item.description: The $1,000 Baby Bonus is projected to grow to only $4,000 — unless you are already wealthy.

item.title: As banks post record earnings, CEOs confront America's inequality gap
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status as SpaceX stock deflates—and Wisconsin officials seek investigation into election 'bribery'
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: Cape Verde's remarkable rise: How a small island nation built a World Cup powerhouse
item.description: Roberto Lopes nearly ignored a LinkedIn message. He went on to anchor a defense that held Spain and pushed Argentina to extra time.
